programmes.show_description: Vanished At Noon. In 2014, Jessica Padgett disappears. Surveillance cameras show her driving into a parking lot and walking down an alley, never to return. What happened to her? S3, Ep4
Body Count. Is the rapist and serial killer known as the Hillside Strangler working alone? Plus, a murderer is stalking California's parks; can detectives stop him killing again? S3, Ep6
Electronic Witness. Mobile phones, CCTV and cashpoints can track virtually every human move. We see exactly how this aids murder investigations. S3, Ep7
The Vanishing Nurse. Nursing student Michelle Le vanishes without a trace. Police discover CCTV footage of her car driving around a parking lot, but who is the driver? S2, Ep3
Good Samaritan. Student Kenia Monge disappears without a trace. The search hits dead ends until detectives uncover chilling surveillance footage, revealing what happened to her. S2, Ep4

Soldier Soldier. Forensic experts uncover the stories behind the deaths of the young men who went to war and never came back. S1, Ep1
Deadly Chemistry. Poisons can be deadly and are often impossible to detect. Forensic experts show how they can solve these mysterious deaths. S1, Ep2
Inside The Bureau. When a bank manager was unable to open the bank vault, the FBI was called in, revealing a sophisticated burglary with estimated losses of $8 million. S6, Ep15
Radical Resistance. The bureau investigates the activities of a Croatian terrorist group who gunned down some of their opponents and eliminated others with parcel bombs. S6, Ep16
Helen McCourt. 22-year-old Helen McCourt went missing on a stormy night in 1988. Her mother Marie desperately fights to find her. S4, Ep1
For Better or for Worse. When Butch Halley finds love with Sunny, he can't wait to start their new life together. But sinister rumours soon threaten to tear the family apart. S1, Ep5

programmes.show_name: On the Case with Paula Zahn
programmes.show_description: Where Is Miya? A college coed disappears, and her family launches a desperate investigation to find her. What they discover will change their lives forever. S12, Ep12
Driven To Murder. When the body of Dawn Meade is found on the side of the road, detectives must determine if it is an accidental death or something more sinister. S8, Ep2
Darren Vickers. Eight-year-old Jamie Lavis was on the bus Darren Vickers was driving before he disappeared. Vickers joined the hunt and spoke on TV - but was hiding an awful truth. S3, Ep5
Life In Florida. In 1997, 78-year-old Jean Schwarzkopf was murdered in Florida. The retiree's husband owned a jewellery business, was she murdered for her diamonds? S6, Ep9
What The Heart Wants. Seven years into their marriage, something changes between a husband and wife - and a dirty secret at work will lead to a deadly confrontation. S7, Ep6

programmes.show_name: Evil Lives Here: Shadows Of Death
programmes.show_description: No Promise For Tomorrow. A landlord approaches his rental home to inspect a broken window when he hears a baby crying. What he finds inside will haunt two families forever. S2, Ep1
Michelle Gunshon. In December 2004, 38-year-old Michelle Gunshon went missing. Police believed Michelle had been murdered and that their prime suspect was on the run. S5, Ep1
Maurice's Last Visitor. When Maurice Byrd is found shot dead in his home, security footage reveals he had many visitors before his body was discovered. But which one is the killer? S4, Ep7
My Father Let The Darkness In. Lisa can't understand why her mum stays with her dad as he is cruel, unpredictable, and violent. When the end comes, it is even worse than she feared. S9, Ep18
My Brother's Secrets. Sean isn't surprised to hear his brother, Patrick, is arrested again - but he realises that each time he helped him he'd helped a monster living a double life. S2, Ep3
The Doctor Will See You. Family man Dr David Cornbleet is brutally murdered in his office. Police must rely on CCTV images of man with a concealed face to lead them to the killer. S3, Ep8
Women Who Kill. A chilling look at the work of female killers. They can be as deadly as their male counterparts, but they choose less violent methods. S3, Ep8
A Taste of Poison. Poisoners: devious killers relying on their victim's trust in order to steal their lives. Find out why they don't usually stop at just one kill. S3, Ep9
Watching Dru. Student Dru Sjodin suddenly vanishes after her shift at Victoria's Secret. CCTV footage shows Dru's last movements revealing the chilling reason for her disappearance. S2, Ep5
Watching Amy Lord. 24-year-old former cheerleader Amy Lord goes missing. CCTV footage from ATMs and outside her home captures the moment she was taken by her killer. S2, Ep6

Double Helix. Just a few microscopic cells, from even a single hair or drop of blood, can place a murderer behind bars. What does DNA mean for crime solving today? S1, Ep6
Tangled Web of Clues. Looks at how the type of insects and their stage of development on a dead body can pinpoint the time of death and even identify the victim. S1, Ep7
Operation Goldenrod. In Beirut armed extremists seize a plane and terrorise everyone on board. The CIA undertakes a daring operation to stop the hijackers; but will they succeed? S6, Ep18
Voice of Terror. In the late 1970s, the FBI had knowledge of anti-Castro terrorists operating in the US. Then, a new group appeared, more violent than their predecessors. S7, Ep1
Michelle Gunshon. In December 2004, 38-year-old Michelle Gunshon went missing. Police believed Michelle had been murdered and that their prime suspect was on the run. S5, Ep1
Stranger Comes to Town. When Mandy meets Paul online, he quickly moves to Kentucky so they can marry. But love soon turns to hate when his controlling behaviour turns murderous. S1, Ep2

programmes.show_name: On the Case with Paula Zahn
programmes.show_description: The Smallest Clue. A murdered teenager's body mysteriously turns up in the rural Iowa countryside. Will the smallest clue be the key to bringing her killer to justice? S12, Ep13
The Other Man. In 2014, a student from China is found murdered in Iowa. CCTV footage points to a planned execution and it opens an international investigation. S8, Ep11
Michael Lane. Shana Grice was murdered after being stalked by her ex-boyfriend, Michael Lane. He denied involvement, but experts examine police videos to determine the truth. S3, Ep6
It Could Be Me. Michelle Lira dreams of being a doctor, until one day a rollercoaster romance steers her life in a different direction, straight into a deadly ambush. S7, Ep8
When's Mom Coming Home? After her divorce Joann Albanese meets a new man. But by the time Joann discovers her boyfriend isn't who he claims to be, it's already too late. S7, Ep11

programmes.show_name: Evil Lives Here: Shadows Of Death
programmes.show_description: A Double Life. In rural Missouri, the body of a young woman lies dead on a deserted dirt road only days before her wedding. Police uncover surprising secrets in her fiancé's life. S2, Ep2
Rolandas Poskus/Amanda Playle. Barrister Robert Rinder examines the case of Rolandas Poskus, a man who was found dead in a park in Hull, and Amanda Playle, a woman who was stalked. S5, Ep3
A Date With Dalene. When Dalene Carlson vanishes in the night, CCTV footage reveals several suspects, each with a motive. Can police uncover the truth behind her disappearance? S4, Ep8
The Truth About Blair. A single mother vanishes without a trace from her suburban home, and detectives uncover a web of lies spun by those closest to her. S9, Ep2

programmes.show_name: The Darkest Of Nights: People Magazine Investigates
programmes.show_description: The small town of Craig is shocked when the charred body of Lauri Waterman, a devoted mother, is found. Who could be responsible for this heinous crime?
